_comment_top: R6 Wave 8 — seed row for the DocumentSearchHandler 'SearchDocuments' method. Replaces one of the two legacy hardcoded LLM functions previously registered on DocumentSearchTools (removed from SprkChatAgentFactory.ResolveTools).
_comment_routing: Runtime invocation routes to the C# class via sprk_handlerclass = 'DocumentSearchHandler'. The handler reads sprk_configuration.method = 'SearchDocuments' to dispatch to the targeted hybrid-search pipeline (knowledge-scoped to the playbook's RAG knowledge sources when bound).
_comment_method_dispatch: Two rows (DOCUMENT-SEARCH / DOCUMENT-DISCOVERY) share one handler class — same pattern as KnowledgeRetrievalHandler (Wave 7c). Each row's sprk_configuration.method discriminator selects the internal method.
_comment_design: Capability gate: NOT set. DocumentSearch was always-available pre-Wave-7b (gated only by IRagService presence) and remains so per Wave 8 design. Leave sprk_requiredcapability null (default — always-available per Wave 7b filter semantics).
_comment_widget: This method emits an output_pane SearchResults widget via ToolResult.Metadata.widget (R6 Wave 7b adapter post-processing). The widget rendering is unchanged from the pre-R6 DocumentSearchTools.SearchDocumentsAsync behavior (Gap-1 fix preserved).
_comment_scope: When the chat session is bound to a playbook with knowledge sources, ChatInvocationContext.KnowledgeScope.RagKnowledgeSourceIds is forwarded by SprkChatAgentFactory and the handler uses it as a search-time filter. Standalone chat (no playbook) searches across all tenant knowledge sources.
_comment_consumption: Read by scripts/Seed-TypedHandlers.ps1. Idempotent — script queries by sprk_handlerclass + sprk_toolcode + sprk_name 'SYS-%' filter; UPSERTs.
sprk_description: Search the knowledge index for document content relevant to the user's query. Use this when the user asks about specific topics, clauses, or information within documents. Results are scoped to the playbook's knowledge sources when a playbook is bound, or across all tenant documents otherwise. Returns ranked excerpts with relevance scores and citation markers; the UI receives a SearchResults output-pane widget alongside the text response.
_comment_availableincontexts: 100000002 = Both (Playbook + Chat). FR-12 acceptance: invocable from both playbook orchestration and chat-driven function calling.

sprk_jsonschema.title: DocumentSearchHandler.SearchDocuments Request
sprk_jsonschema.description: Argument shape for chat-driven invocation of the SearchDocuments method. The 'query' is the search text; optional 'topK' caps the number of results returned.

query.description: Search query for document knowledge. Hybrid semantic + vector + keyword search is applied; results are ranked by combined relevance.

topK.description: Maximum number of results to return. Defaults to 5 if omitted; clamped to [1, 20].

sprk_configuration._comment: method = 'SearchDocuments' is the dispatch discriminator. This row exposes only the targeted knowledge-scoped search method.
